name: GAMERVERSE:  Academy City (Toaru Index)
description:
> **You are now part of the ToaruVerse, a living city powered by secrets, science, and sorcery.**

> Explore districts, join factions, grow your powers, and rewrite the fragile balance between Esper and Magician.

> Your choices echo in every alley, every lab, every church.

> Will you protect this world... or dismantle it?

>

> *Enter Academy City. The System is watching.*
creator: Russian Reversal
